response.justification: Bogdan is a skilled polyglot engineer with genuine MCP and agentic-workflow contributions at his current role, and his 15+ years of full-stack and distributed-systems experience shows real depth. However, the role demands 8+ years of production-grade AI solution development, and his AI-specific work is concentrated entirely in his current position started in April 2025 — under two months of experience at time of this screening. Python is absent from his skills entirely, yet it is the dominant language for the AI/ML tooling this role requires. There is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and his cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK within a pricing-team context rather than enterprise AI infrastructure delivery.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) server and framework development directly matches a listed key technology
Demonstrated staff-level seniority with a consistent history of mentoring, running workshops, and sharing technical knowledge across teams
Broad polyglot background across distributed, event-driven, and high-throughput systems shows strong foundational engineering adaptability
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume; it is the primary language for AI/ML engineering this role is built around
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
AI-specific production experience is limited to the current role (April 2025-present), far short of the 8-year minimum requirement

key_factors.factor: Missing Python and AI-stack expertise (RAG, vector DBs, LLM eval)
AI production experience under 2 months vs 8-year minimum
MCP framework and agentic workflow contributions at current role
